success_factors: Workflow completed end-to-end with status=success across all planned nodes (download, analysis, env, generate, run, review, finalize).
Repository is small/simple (14 files, low intrusiveness risk), enabling reliable import-based adapter generation.
Single clear functional target (`show_versions`) reduced ambiguity and generation complexity.
MCP plugin health checks passed (service healthy over stdio), indicating runnable generated scaffold.
No runtime errors or warnings were captured in workflow logs.
failure_reasons: DeepWiki analysis failed (non-blocking) and reduced external contextual enrichment.
Original project test status is effectively weak/invalid despite reported 100% coverage (empty/near-empty executed suite), limiting confidence in behavioral correctness.
Telemetry fields (LLM calls, performance/resource metrics, generated LOC/file sizes) are zero/unknown, indicating instrumentation gaps rather than execution failure.

node_performance.download_time: Completed successfully; repo fetched via zip fallback. Timing breakdown per node not provided, so only total runtime (150.74s) is known.
node_performance.analysis_time: Successful static analysis and import-feasibility scoring (0.95). DeepWiki sub-step failed but did not block pipeline.
node_performance.generation_time: Generation succeeded with 7 files created and import-mode adapter. Endpoint coverage includes `show_versions` plus health/version tooling.
node_performance.test_time: MCP plugin runtime check passed; original project tests provide low assurance due to minimal/empty effective suite and no meaningful execution timing.

resource_usage.memory_efficiency: Undetermined from telemetry (reported 0 MB). Likely acceptable given tiny codebase, but metrics collection is missing.
resource_usage.cpu_efficiency: Undetermined from telemetry (reported 0%). Runtime suggests low-to-moderate CPU demand, but no hard evidence.
resource_usage.disk_usage: Low expected disk footprint (small repo and scaffold), but generated size is reported as 0, indicating measurement not captured.
